task_description: Phase 68 - UI/UX Excellence Pass: Create shared animated motion primitives (framer-motion), responsive layout system, command palette UI, theme provider with dark mode, and apply them across all 7 Next.js frontend apps for premium vibe with spring animations, responsive 360-1440px, dark mode, and branded interactions.

verification.summary: pnpm typecheck (111 tasks), pnpm build (88 tasks), pnpm test (114 tasks, 201 in shared-ui alone) all pass. Semantic review v2 approved with 3 low-severity notes for future iterations (partial useReducedMotion on drag components, media query gap at 361-413px, shake keyframes duplication).
